trans-unit.source: Allow anonymous access to the dashboard
trans-unit.target: Allow anonymous access to the dashboard

trans-unit.source: The 'aspire dashboard' command requires the CLI bundle, but no bundle layout was found. The bundle provides the dashboard binary and supporting files. Run 'aspire setup --force' to extract the bundle, or reinstall the Aspire CLI.
trans-unit.target: The 'aspire dashboard' command requires the CLI bundle, but no bundle layout was found. The bundle provides the dashboard binary and supporting files. Run 'aspire setup --force' to extract the bundle, or reinstall the Aspire CLI.

trans-unit.source: The Aspire dashboard requires the CLI bundle. The bundle was not found.
trans-unit.target: The Aspire dashboard requires the CLI bundle. The bundle was not found.

trans-unit.source: The path for a JSON configuration file
trans-unit.target: The path for a JSON configuration file

trans-unit.source: Dashboard could not start because a configured port is already in use. Use a different port or stop the conflicting process.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard could not start because a configured port is already in use. Use a different port or stop the conflicting process.

trans-unit.source: Dashboard exited unexpectedly due to an error. See logs for details.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard exited unexpectedly due to an error. See logs for details.

trans-unit.source: Dashboard configuration is invalid. Check the provided options and try again.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard configuration is invalid. Check the provided options and try again.

trans-unit.source: Dashboard exited with exit code {0}.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard exited with exit code {0}.

trans-unit.source: Failed to start Aspire dashboard: {0}
trans-unit.target: Failed to start Aspire dashboard: {0}

trans-unit.source: Dashboard
trans-unit.target: Dashboard

trans-unit.source: Dashboard did not become ready within the expected time.
trans-unit.target: Dashboard did not become ready within the expected time.

trans-unit.source: Dashboard started (PID {0}).
trans-unit.target: Dashboard started (PID {0}).

trans-unit.source: Manage the Aspire dashboard (Preview)
trans-unit.target: Manage the Aspire dashboard (Preview)

trans-unit.source: One or more HTTP endpoints through which the dashboard frontend is served
trans-unit.target: One or more HTTP endpoints through which the dashboard frontend is served

trans-unit.source: Logs
trans-unit.target: Logs

trans-unit.source: The CLI bundle layout was found, but the dashboard binary (aspire-managed) is missing. The bundle may be corrupted or incomplete. Run 'aspire setup --force' to re-extract the bundle, or reinstall the Aspire CLI.
trans-unit.target: The CLI bundle layout was found, but the dashboard binary (aspire-managed) is missing. The bundle may be corrupted or incomplete. Run 'aspire setup --force' to re-extract the bundle, or reinstall the Aspire CLI.

trans-unit.source: OTLP/gRPC
trans-unit.target: OTLP/gRPC

trans-unit.source: The OTLP/gRPC endpoint. This endpoint hosts an OTLP service and receives telemetry using gRPC
trans-unit.target: The OTLP/gRPC endpoint. This endpoint hosts an OTLP service and receives telemetry using gRPC

trans-unit.source: OTLP/HTTP
trans-unit.target: OTLP/HTTP

trans-unit.source: The OTLP/HTTP endpoint. This endpoint hosts an OTLP service and receives telemetry using Protobuf over HTTP
trans-unit.target: The OTLP/HTTP endpoint. This endpoint hosts an OTLP service and receives telemetry using Protobuf over HTTP

trans-unit.source: Start the Aspire dashboard (Preview)
trans-unit.target: Start the Aspire dashboard (Preview)

trans-unit.source: Starting dashboard...
trans-unit.target: Starting dashboard...

trans-unit.source: Stopping dashboard
trans-unit.target: Stopping dashboard
